name: Size Exclusion Chromatography (SEC / Gel Filtration)
nameCn: 分子排阻色谱（SEC / 凝胶过滤）蛋白纯化

briefSteps.en: Concentrate and filter protein sample → select appropriate SEC column by MW range → equilibrate column with 1.5 CV running buffer → inject sample → run at constant flow collecting 0.5–2 mL fractions → pool symmetric peak → verify by SDS-PAGE → clean and store column in 20% EtOH
briefSteps.zh: 浓缩并过滤蛋白样品 → 按分子量选择合适 SEC 柱 → 1.5 CV 运行缓冲液平衡柱子 → 进样 → 恒流运行收集 0.5–2 mL 组分 → 合并对称峰 → SDS-PAGE 验证 → 清洗柱子并储存于 20% EtOH

detailedSteps.en: Prepare protein sample: concentrate to ≥1 mg/mL, centrifuge at 20,000×g for 20 min at 4°C to remove aggregates, then filter through 0.22 µm membrane. Analytical injection: ≤500 µL; preparative (16/60 column): ≤5 mL.
detailedSteps.zh: 制备蛋白样品：浓缩至 ≥1 mg/mL，20,000×g、4°C 离心 20 min 去除聚集体，再过 0.22 µm 膜。分析型进样 ≤500 µL；制备型（16/60 柱）≤5 mL。

detailedSteps.en: Select SEC column appropriate for the target protein MW: Superdex 75 (3–70 kDa), Superdex 200 (10–600 kDa), or Superose 6 (5–5,000 kDa). For analytical runs use 10/300 GL (24 mL); for preparative use 16/60 (120 mL) or 26/60 (320 mL).
detailedSteps.zh: 按目标蛋白 MW 选柱：Superdex 75（3–70 kDa）、Superdex 200（10–600 kDa）或 Superose 6（5–5,000 kDa）。分析型用 10/300 GL（24 mL），制备型用 16/60（120 mL）或 26/60（320 mL）。

detailedSteps.en: Equilibrate column with 1.5 CV SEC running buffer (e.g., 50 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 150 mM NaCl, 1 mM DTT). Flow rate: 0.4–0.5 mL/min (10/300 GL) or 1.0–1.5 mL/min (16/60). Pressure limit 1.5–1.8 MPa. Monitor A280 until baseline is stable.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 1.5 CV SEC 运行缓冲液（如 50 mM HEPES pH 7.5、150 mM NaCl、1 mM DTT）平衡柱子。流速：0.4–0.5 mL/min（10/300 GL）或 1.0–1.5 mL/min（16/60）。压力限 1.5–1.8 MPa。监测 A280 至基线稳定。

detailedSteps.en: Rinse sample loop with water then running buffer. Load sample into loop and inject at 0.5 mL/min. Note the injection volume precisely for later Kav calculation.
detailedSteps.zh: 样品环先用水冲洗再用运行缓冲液平衡。将样品装入上样环并以 0.5 mL/min 注入。精确记录进样体积以备 Kav 计算。

detailedSteps.en: Run 1.2 CV at constant flow. Collect 0.5 mL fractions (analytical) or 1–2 mL fractions (preparative). Monitor A280 (protein) and A260 (nucleic acid contamination). Void volume V₀ ≈ 0.35 CV; total column volume Vt ≈ CV.
detailedSteps.zh: 恒流运行 1.2 CV。收集 0.5 mL（分析型）或 1–2 mL（制备型）组分。监测 A280（蛋白）和 A260（核酸污染）。空体积 V₀ ≈ 0.35 CV；总柱体积 Vt ≈ CV。

detailedSteps.en: Pool symmetric, non-tailing peak fractions. Asymmetric tailing indicates aggregation or multiple species — pool only the main symmetric peak. Verify composition and purity by SDS-PAGE.
detailedSteps.zh: 合并对称、无拖尾的峰组分。不对称拖尾表明有聚集体或多组分——仅合并主对称峰。SDS-PAGE 验证组成和纯度。

detailedSteps.en: Optional: run MW calibration standards (GE LMW/HMW kit) on first use of new column. Plot log(MW) vs Kav = (Ve−V₀)/(Vt−V₀). Couple with SEC-MALS for absolute molecular weight determination.
detailedSteps.zh: 可选：新柱首次使用时跑 MW 校准标准品（GE LMW/HMW 套装）。绘制 log(MW) vs Kav = (Ve−V₀)/(Vt−V₀)。联用 SEC-MALS 测定绝对分子量。

detailedSteps.en: Clean column with 1 CV 2 M NaCl at reduced flow rate, then re-equilibrate with 1.5 CV running buffer. Store column in 20% ethanol at 4°C. Never allow column to run dry.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 1 CV 2 M NaCl 低流速清洗柱子，再用 1.5 CV 运行缓冲液重新平衡。柱子储存于 4°C 的 20% 乙醇中。切勿让柱子跑干。

note.en: Prepared and filtered protein sample can be held at 4°C for up to 24 hours before injection.
note.zh: 制备并过滤好的蛋白样品可在 4°C 保存最多 24 小时后再进样。

note.en: Pooled peak fractions can be stored at 4°C overnight or snap-frozen at −80°C with 10% glycerol.
note.zh: 合并的峰值组分可在 4°C 保存过夜，或加 10% 甘油后液氮速冻于 −80°C 保存。

components.name: 1. Prepare sample: ≥1 mg/mL, centrifuge 20,000×g 20 min 4°C, filter 0.22 µm

note.en: Remove aggregates before injection. Analytical: ≤500 µL; preparative: ≤5 mL (16/60 column).
note.zh: 进样前去除聚集体。分析型：≤500 µL；制备型：≤5 mL（16/60 柱）。

components.name: 2. Select SEC column by MW range

note.en: Superdex 75 (3–70 kDa), Superdex 200 (10–600 kDa), Superose 6 (5–5,000 kDa). Analytical: 10/300 GL (24 mL). Preparative: 16/60 (120 mL) or 26/60 (320 mL).
note.zh: Superdex 75（3–70 kDa）、Superdex 200（10–600 kDa）、Superose 6（5–5,000 kDa）。分析型：10/300 GL（24 mL）。制备型：16/60（120 mL）。

note.en: Flow rate: 0.4–0.5 mL/min (10/300 GL); 1.0–1.5 mL/min (16/60). Pressure limit: 1.5–1.8 MPa. Monitor A280 baseline stability.

components.name: 4. Inject sample via clean sample loop

note.en: Rinse loop with water then running buffer before injection. Inject at 0.5 mL/min.
note.zh: 上样环先用水再用运行缓冲液冲洗。0.5 mL/min 注入。

components.name: 5. Run: 1.2 CV at constant flow; collect 0.5 mL (analytical) or 1–2 mL (preparative) fractions

note.en: Monitor A280 (protein), A260 (nucleic acids). V₀ ≈ 0.35 CV; Vt ≈ CV.
note.zh: 监测 A280（蛋白）、A260（核酸）。V₀ ≈ 0.35 CV；Vt ≈ CV。

components.name: 6. Pool symmetric peak fractions; verify by SDS-PAGE

note.en: Asymmetric tailing = aggregation or multiple species. Only pool the main symmetric peak.
note.zh: 不对称拖尾 = 聚集体或多组分。仅合并对称峰组分。

components.name: 7. Optional: run MW calibration standards (first time per column)

note.en: GE LMW/HMW kit. Plot log(MW) vs Kav = (Ve−V₀)/(Vt−V₀). Couple with SEC-MALS for absolute MW.
note.zh: GE LMW/HMW 校准套装。绘 log(MW) vs Kav = (Ve−V₀)/(Vt−V₀)。联用 SEC-MALS 可测绝对分子量。

components.name: 8. Clean column: 1 CV 2 M NaCl, re-equilibrate; store in 20% EtOH at 4°C

note.en: Never run column dry. Monthly: 0.5 CV 0.5 M NaOH for biofilm removal (check column compatibility).
note.zh: 切勿让柱子跑干。每月：0.5 CV 0.5 M NaOH 清除生物膜（需确认柱子兼容性）。

notes.en: SEC is gold-standard polishing step. Separates by hydrodynamic radius. Excellent for: removing aggregates, determining oligomeric state, buffer exchange. Keep sample:column volume ≤1–2% for best resolution. Run at 4°C for labile proteins.
notes.zh: SEC 是蛋白精修的金标准。按流体力学半径分离。适合去除聚集体、确定寡聚状态、换液。样品:柱体积 ≤1–2% 以获最佳分辨率。不稳定蛋白在 4°C 进行。

ref: Wyatt et al. (2017) Nat Protoc 12:1683–1701; GE Healthcare SEC Application Note 18-1114-02

usage.en: Separate proteins by size using size-exclusion (gel filtration) chromatography.
usage.zh: 分子筛（凝胶过滤）层析按蛋白质大小分离。
